symptoms: planner: fix the unstable unit test `TestAnalyzeIncremental`
failure_signature: planner: fix the unstable unit test `TestAnalyzeIncremental`
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness/race risk came from tests mutating shared global statistics knobs (e.g., handle.MinLogScanCount / MinLogErrorRate) which can be accessed concurrently by other code/tests. This PR stabilizes it by switching those globals to atomic access patterns (Load/Store) to avoid data races when tests run concurrently.

evidence: evidence: planner: fix the unstable unit test `TestAnalyzeIncremental`
